post.description:
Studio contract: create workflow from nlp_input; persist and return workflow_id.

Phase 2: create workflow + DB run, enqueue background pipeline job, return quickly with workflow_id.
Studio polls /api/v1/workflows/{id} and /api/v1/runs/{id}/steps for progress.
Credit-based: when credits_supabase is configured, deducts credits per run (CREDITS_PER_RUN); insufficient balance returns 402.

schema.title: Response Workflows Generate Api V1 Workflows Generate Post

Pinata sends pin completion events. Set PINATA_WEBHOOK_SECRET to the signing secret

schema.title: X-Pinata-Signature
X-Pinata-Hmac-Sha256
Response Pinata Pin Webhook Api V1 Storage Webhooks Pinata Post

get.description:
Liveness: HTTP 200 if the app process is serving. No I/O to Supabase, Redis, or downstream services.
Use this for Docker/Kubernetes liveness so transient dependency failures do not mark the container dead.
Readiness and dependency status remain on GET /health and /health/ready.

Readiness: checks critical dependencies (Supabase, Redis when QUEUE_ENABLED).
Returns 503 if any critical dep is unreachable. Use for K8s readiness probes
so traffic is not routed to pods that cannot serve requests.

Health and registry versions. Returns 503 when startup env is missing or
critical deps (Supabase, Redis when QUEUE_ENABLED) fail.
Prometheus-format metrics for pipeline runs and p95 latency.

Detailed health for Studio. Includes Supabase, Redis, compile, simulation, deploy, tools, RAG.
Includes p95_latency_ms for SLO monitoring (target: under 2000ms).

schema.title: Response Health Detailed Api V1 Health Detailed Get

get.description: Debug endpoint: raw integration health. Use to diagnose Settings > Integrations 'Not configured'.

get.description:
Return ERC-8004 agent identity for this HyperAgent instance.

Includes agentId, identityRegistry address, and registration proof (txHash) from
infra/registries/erc8004/erc8004.yaml. The agent is pre-registered on SKALE Sepolia
(agentId=1) and Avalanche Fuji (agentId=60). New chain registration is Phase 2.

schema.title: Response Get Agent Identity Api V1 Identity Get

post.description:
Register this HyperAgent instance on ERC-8004 IdentityRegistry for the given chain.
Requires ERC8004_REGISTER_PRIVATE_KEY. Persists proof to agent_registrations. Returns agentId, txHash, persistedProof.

schema.title: Body
Response Register Agent Identity Api V1 Identity Register Post

amount.title: Amount
amount.description: Credit amount to add (e.g. fiat/USDC/USDT conversion)

api_keys.title: Api Keys
api_keys.description: Optional LLM keys for resume; when omitted, uses workspace keys.

mainnet_confirm.title: Mainnet Confirm
mainnet_confirm.description: Set true to confirm mainnet deploy; required for mainnet chain_id.

agent_uri.title: Agent Uri
agent_uri.description: Agent metadata URI. Defaults to ERC8004_AGENT_URI or https://hyperkitlabs.com/agent.json

include_deploy_scripts.title: Include Deploy Scripts
include_deploy_scripts.description: Include deployment scripts when contract source available

deploy_target.title: Deploy Target
deploy_target.description: Export target: zip, ipfs, vercel, sandbox, or coolify. sandbox/coolify = self-hosted primary.
